subject: A goblin-type technician in goggles and a leather workshop apron examines a flying mechanical thopter drone
description: A stout, big-eared humanoid figure — clearly goblin-type, with large ears, a wide face, and a gap-toothed grin — stands in a cluttered workshop. The figure wears goggles pushed up on their head, a leather apron, and a mechanical gauntlet on one arm. They hold up a mechanical flying device — a skull-faced thopter drone with spinning blue propeller blades and multiple articulated arms — and examine it with evident pride. Around the figure: vials, a wrench on the table, chains on the floor, and various glowing crystals. The palette is warm brass and gold tones against a teal-green background, giving a steampunk-tinged workshop feel.
foreground: goblin-type figure in goggles holding a mechanical flying drone
background: cluttered workshop with vials, crystals, chains, tools
emotion: gleeful pride — grinning broadly at creation
